content.speakerText: We're grabbing drinks after work—join us? Everyone’s going!
content.speakerTextCn: 下班后一起去喝一杯？大家都去！

options.text: That sounds like so much fun! I’ve got a doctor’s appointment, but I’d love to join next time!
Why are you always inviting me? I hate parties.
Sure, I’ll be there in 10 minutes.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了积极的语气+具体理由+未来承诺，符合礼貌拒绝的社交规范。选项1过于敷衍，选项3具有攻击性，选项4与拒绝意图矛盾。

content.speakerText: Come on, it’s just one drink—you always say no!
content.speakerTextCn: 来嘛，就一杯，你每次都拒绝！

options.text: Yeah, I’m just not a social person.
I know I’ve been a party pooper lately—I’m working on it! Let me treat you all next Friday?
Fine, I’ll come, but only if you pay.
I don’t drink, so why ask me?

content.explanation: 正确答案用幽默自嘲+改进承诺化解尴尬，是高情商回应。选项1消极负面，选项3态度傲慢，选项4虽真实但缺乏社交润滑，易引发不适。

content.speakerText: Hey, the team is heading to that new Thai place after work—want to come?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，团队下班后要去新开的泰餐厅，一起来吗？

options.text: I’d love to, but I have a piano lesson tonight. Can I join you next week?
Thai food? No thanks, I hate spicy food.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了积极开头+具体理由+未来邀请，符合场景最佳实践。选项1理由牵强，选项3直接批评食物，选项4是接受而非拒绝，不符合题干要求。

content.template: That sounds like so much fun! I’ve got a ______ appointment, but I’d love to join next time!
content.hint: 用于表达合理且可信的个人事务理由
content.knowledgePoint: 场景高频词汇（个人事务类理由）

content.template: I know I’ve been a ______ lately—I’m working on it!
content.hint: 幽默自嘲的常用表达，用于软化拒绝
content.knowledgePoint: 场景核心句型（幽默自嘲表达）

content.template: I’m trying to ______ this month, but thanks so much for inviting me!
content.hint: 用于表达减少饮酒/社交的自我管理目标
content.knowledgePoint: 场景惯用搭配（健康/节制表达）

content.speakerText: We're grabbing drinks after work—join us? Everyone’s going!
content.speakerTextCn: 下班后一起去喝一杯？大家都去！
expectedAnswers: That sounds awesome! I’ve got a dentist appointment, but I’d really like to join next time!
I wish I could! I’m helping my sister move tonight—let me buy you guys dinner next week?
I’m flattered, but I’ve got a family dinner. You all have a great night!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确拒绝但表达遗憾和未来意愿
语言准确性：语法正确，使用恰当的动词搭配（如 'have an appointment', 'join next time'）
表达自然度：语气友好，符合英语母语者日常回应习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了 'appointment', 'next time', 'join' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Come on, it’s just one drink—you always say no!
content.speakerTextCn: 来嘛，就一杯，你每次都拒绝！
expectedAnswers: Haha, guilty as charged! I’m cutting back for health reasons—I’ll treat you all next Friday!
You’re right, I’ve been a bit of a buzzkill. Let me make it up to you by organizing the next outing?
I know, I’m working on being more social. How about I bring dessert next time?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：承认行为模式 + 用幽默或改进承诺化解压力
语言准确性：使用了 'guilty', 'cutting back', 'treat', 'buzzkill' 等地道表达
表达自然度：语气轻松，不防御，有社交智慧
关键词覆盖：使用了 'cutting back', 'treat', 'next time', 'buzzkill' 等核心表达

content.speakerText: The team is going to karaoke after dinner—want to come?
content.speakerTextCn: 团队下班后去唱K，一起来吗？
expectedAnswers: I’d love to, but I’ve got a late Zoom call. Maybe next time?
Karaoke? I’m not the best singer—but I’ll come if you promise not to make me go first!
I’m a bit tired tonight, but I really appreciate the invite. Let me know when you plan the next one!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：清晰拒绝但保持积极态度，提供替代方案或未来意愿
语言准确性：使用自然口语结构，如 'I’d love to, but...', 'I’m a bit tired', 'Let me know'
表达自然度：语气真诚、有幽默感或共情，符合职场社交语境
关键词覆盖：使用了 'appreciate the invite', 'next time', 'plan the next one' 等场景高频表达
